text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appelé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>, avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 24</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son bien & de conserver sa santé</TITLE>, par <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>, Augmente dun Nouveau Supplement de deux Volumes, par <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR> .<FORMAT>Avec fig.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>; davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht <PRICE>fl. 18</PRICE></BIBL>. So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben: <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>- <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. <PRICE>L. 27</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofrest</TITLE> <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1740</YEAR>. <PRICE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRICE></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE> <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME> <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <YEAR>1741</YEAR>. <PRICE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":22,"explanation":"Fixed 22 issues: 1) Restored character encoding for German/French umlauts and special characters (e.g., Buchläden, Bücher, appelé, santé). 2) Corrected OCR/transcription errors likely caused by encoding (2vec->Avec, dien->bien, deur->deux, 4to.). 3) Escaped ampersands (&) to & for valid XML. 4) Standardized price tags from PRIZE to PRICE for consistency. 5) Fixed mismatched closing tag in the last BIBL entry. 6) Removed garbage characters (\\u221a\\u2020) preceding price elements."}

parsed.explanation: Fixed 22 issues: 1) Restored character encoding for German/French umlauts and special characters (e.g., Buchläden, Bücher, appelé, santé). 2) Corrected OCR/transcription errors likely caused by encoding (2vec->Avec, dien->bien, deur->deux, 4to.). 3) Escaped ampersands (&) to & for valid XML. 4) Standardized price tags from PRIZE to PRICE for consistency. 5) Fixed mismatched closing tag in the last BIBL entry. 6) Removed garbage characters (\u221a\u2020) preceding price elements.
